name: Rubric-Blind Failure-to-Procedure Loop
objective: Define a redacted Solver, Evaluator, and Learner Proposal loop that separates evidence from a future customer promotion decision.
non_goals: No legal advice, law retrieval, client document read, legal task execution, or automatic learning.
inputs: Future synthetic non-legal fixture and a customer-approved redaction policy.
outputs: Future redacted failure signal and procedure-change proposal.

read: Future approved synthetic fixture and redaction policy

excluded_patterns: Traceability, decision-log, retrospective, changelog, and documentation patterns require a separate provenance design.
known_gaps: The proposal does not run an evaluator or prove that feedback is rubric-safe.
